name: ASUS PRIME B760M-A AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 4x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2x HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760M-A AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mainstream micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6 connectivity.
